label: solitary figure in soft shadow with framing border — human form alone in a contemplative space; rooted in the body and the breath, not in any architectural setting
an open palm warming in low candlelight — interior gesture of care; the held breath of attention, hand as figurative subject
a slow ink line drying on paper — calligraphic stroke as material; weight, breath, and pause, not decorative script
thin line of moonlight on still water at night — single horizontal stroke of soft light catching a dark surface; the scene's sustained breath, the canonical Bayati signature
NOT this — generic synthetic visualizer aesthetic (unlocated flowing effects, no recognizable subject)
